mod.maid_affection.name: Maid Affection
mod.maid_affection.description: Kiss your maid! Adds affectionate interactions to Touhou Little Maid.
tips.maid_affection.kiss: Sneak + empty hand right-click maid to kiss
tips.maid_affection.kiss_carryon: CarryOn detected: Sneak + empty main hand + item in offhand right-click maid to kiss
tips.maid_affection.offhand_tempt: Holding temptation items (default: cake) in offhand also attracts maids
